checks.name: conceptual_model_completeness
checks.description: PI Co-Pilot defined: definition, progressive context (L0-L3), interaction hierarchy (9 modes, 3 tiers), knowledge graph (7 domains), governance boundaries, non-goals

checks.name: progressive_context_continuity
checks.description: Co-Pilot is useful at all 4 levels. Level 0 requires no specimen. Progressive enrichment preserves surface continuity.

checks.name: interaction_hierarchy_completeness
checks.description: 9 modes across 3 tiers (Understand/Curate/Publish). Per-mode minimum context level defined. Tier relationships specified.

checks.name: knowledge_graph_coverage
checks.description: 7 domains defined: Doctrine, Commercial, Runtime, Vault, Specimen, Verdict, Publishing. Per-domain specimen requirement specified.

checks.name: governance_boundaries
checks.description: Constitutional invariant: never creates intelligence. Strategic test defined. 9 operational rules specified. 13 absolute prohibitions inherited from 75.x.

checks.name: non_goals_defined
checks.description: 7 non-goals specified with justification. Co-Pilot is NOT: customer-facing, consulting platform, qualification engine, pipeline operator, LENS replacement, Assessment Package replacement, generic chatbot.

checks.name: operator_cognition_surface_distinction
checks.description: Co-Pilot defined as operator cognition surface (not feature). Moat articulated: assembled context from PI knowledge graph pre-loaded before interaction.

checks.name: enablement_plan_completeness
checks.description: SA delivery playbook (§3.4), PI Co-Pilot model (§4), SA-DD hosting MVP (§5), convergent consumption model (§6) all defined.

checks.name: implementation_readiness
checks.description: 12 solved questions, 4 conceptual areas needing design, 3 immediately buildable workstreams, 5-phase build sequence, 5 risk areas identified.

checks.name: sa_delivery_readiness
checks.description: SA delivery playbook fully defined. Zero code required. Zero dependencies. READY NOW.

checks.name: sadd_hosting_readiness
checks.description: SA-DD hosting MVP fully specified: ~550 LOC across 4 components. Prerequisites: VM + domain + TLS. READY TO BUILD.

checks.name: copilot_level0_readiness
checks.description: Co-Pilot Level 0 (doctrine + commercial) identified as buildable. ~400 LOC. One design decision pending (context loading strategy).

checks.name: baseline_frozen
checks.description: PI_COPILOT_CONCEPTUAL_BASELINE.md produced as frozen model. Future discussions: implementation, UX, context assembly — NOT conceptual reopening.

checks.name: no_runtime_mutation
checks.description: Stream produces documentation artifacts only — no code changes

checks.name: cross_reference_integrity
checks.description: All cross-references point to co-produced or existing artifacts (CONSUMPTION_ARCHITECTURE_BASELINE, ENABLEMENT_PLAN, PRODUCT_GAP_REGISTER, CONSUMER_PROJECTION_BOUNDARY)

checks.name: discovery_path_documented
checks.description: 3-iteration discovery path documented: Advisory Workbench → Structural Verdict Co-Pilot → PI Co-Pilot. Each iteration corrected abstraction center of gravity.
